---
applyTo: "**/*.md,docs/**"
---
# Documentation Instructions
<!-- DYNAMIC FILE -->

- Add a timestamp to every documentation update.
- Keep docs factual, concise, and repository-specific.
- Update `docs/ai/mistakes.md` immediately when a mistake is found.
- Update `docs/ai/decision-log.md` when a durable decision is made.
- Update `docs/ai/change-trace.md` after each meaningful sub-step.
- Newest entries first in all log files.
- Do not defer documentation updates — write them as soon as the information is known.
